issues.message: After the fix establishes `FieldButton.Control` as the required style host, this token/state section still documents the stroke/padding/bg overrides as `root` styles. That leaves the file internally inconsistent about which wrapper owns the visual recipe and can mislead readers back to the pre-fix structure.

The new anti-pattern says deep-path icon imports are wrong, but this file's own examples still import `IconCheckmarkFatFill` from the same deep path (for example at lines 120, 160, and 207). The fix corrected the `@daangn/` package name but replaced it with contradictory guidance.
